title: petrosedum rupestre subsp. montanum
intro: Petrosedum rupestre subsp. montanum, also known as mountain stonecrop, is a succulent plant species in the family Crassulaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and potentially aiding in the management of certain health conditions. Herbal preparations of Petrosedum rupestre subsp. montanum can be made by infusing the leaves in water or oil, and it is often used in teas, salves, and other topical applications.
